mapper.update:
UPDATE blog
blog_title = #{title},
blog_body = #{body},
blog_discussCount = #{discussCount},
blog_blogViews = #{blogViews},
blog_time = #{time},
blog_state = #{state},
WHERE blog_id = #{id}
UPDATE blog SET like_count = IF(#{count} < 0, 0, #{count}) WHERE blog_id = #{blogId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) from blog_tag bt LEFT JOIN blog b on bt.blog_id = b.blog_id WHERE tag_id = #{value} AND b.blog_state = 1

SELECT blog_id,blog_title,LEFT (blog_body,150) AS blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{id} AND b.blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_time DESC
select count(1) from Blog where user_id=#{value}
SELECT count(1) FROM blog WHERE blog_state = 1

SELECT blog_id,blog_title, blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_blogViews DESC,blog_discussCount DESC LIMIT 0,#{value}

SELECT blog_id,blog_title,LEFT (blog_body,150) AS blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ( b.blog_title LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchText} , '%') OR b.blog_body LIKE CONCAT('%' , #{searchText} , '%')) AND b.blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog WHERE (blog_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{value}, '%') OR blog_body LIKE CONCAT('%', #{value}, '%')) AND blog_state = 1

SELECT blog_id,blog_title,LEFT (blog_body,150) AS blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY blog_state DESC,blog_time DESC

SELECT blog_id,blog_title,blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_time DESC
select count(1) from blog where blog_title like concat('%',#{value},'%')

SELECT blog_id,blog_title,LEFT (blog_body,150) AS blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE blog_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') and blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_state DESC,blog_time DESC
SELECT YEAR(blog_time) year, MONTH(blog_time) month,COUNT(1) count FROM blog WHERE blog_state = 1 GROUP BY YEAR(blog_time),MONTH(blog_time) ORDER by year DESC, month DESC LIMIT 0,#{value}

SELECT blog_id,blog_title, blog_body,blog_discussCount,blog_blogViews,blog_time,blog_state,b.user_id,u.user_name,u.user_avatar FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u on b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE b.blog_state = 1 ORDER BY blog_time DESC LIMIT #{start},#{showCount}
